options.name: -filter
options.description: Filters the collection with the specified expression

options.name: -from
options.description: Creates a collection of all library arcs that originate from the specified library pins

options.name: -of_objects
options.description: < lib_cell_list | timing_arcs > Creates a collection of all library arcs that are associated with the specified library cells or timing arcs

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Suppresses all error and warning messages generated when the get_lib_arcs command is run

options.name: -to
options.description: Creates a collection of all library arcs that terminate at the specified library pins
